race.comment: NOBLER (19) handy import poking along okay in Victoria. Chipped away late on a shifty surface second-up to finish sixth over this trip at Caulfield. Should relish the Randwick track from the inside draw. Genuine player with the 53.5kg. FIDDLERS GREEN (5) has come back a much stronger gelding this campaign and hard to stop in this vein of form. Sat on the good speed and never looked in danger with a soft victory over 1600m at Warwick Farm. Deep into the prep and can overcome the awkward draw in this tougher race. Go close. POISEN POINT (16) handy Dubbo-trained mare who can surprise some of these with the claim. Huge effort from last on the turn to run fourth in the Country Champs Final over 1400m at this track. Has the ability to find the winners' list. CROSSBOW (13) defied a lack of market support last start with a surprise victory over 1400m at Randwick Kensington in weaker class. Kept up to the mark with a tick over trial and will relish Grima's 3kg claim. KING PEDRO (9) has claims.
